name: Tobacco Use Screening Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and LOINC codes for tobacco use screening and assessment. Used in the tobacco screening and cessation intervention measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Smoking and tobacco use cessation counseling visit; intermediate, greater than 3 minutes up to 10 minutes
Smoking and tobacco use cessation counseling visit; intensive, greater than 10 minutes
Current tobacco smoker or current smokeless tobacco user (CAP)
Patient screened for tobacco use and identified as a tobacco user
Patient screened for tobacco use and identified as a tobacco non-user
Patient not screened for tobacco use
